name: debt-ops
description: Catches AI-introduced tech debt at write-time. Every "I'll fix this later," every shortcut, every punt your AI agent writes gets caught.

interface.shortDescription: Catches AI-introduced tech debt at write-time
interface.longDescription: Every "I'll fix this later," shortcut, and punt your AI agent writes lands in a folder in your repo. Architectural calls get a short ADR. When you're ready to clean up, a review skill ranks the backlog by how often each file changes, so you pay down the debt that actually hurts first. Plain Python, fully local, no network calls.
